account.businessDescription: pharmaceutical formulations manufacturer specializing in APIs and intermediates for the domestic market

companion.name: Rajesh Kapoor
companion.title: Managing Director
companion.background: M.Pharm, MBA (XLRI), 22 years in pharma manufacturing

companion.systemsInUse: Tally for accounting, Excel for production planning, WhatsApp for coordination

verbatim.quote: The thing I want to fix is leads. We get maybe 12 qualified inquiries a month.
verbatim.interpretation: Pipeline volume is the identified bottleneck — founder sees lead generation as the highest-leverage KPI

companion.measurementMethod: Sales team count — no CRM tracking

verbatim.quote: We get maybe 12 qualified inquiries a month... I want to get to 30 per month.
verbatim.interpretation: Baseline is approximate (felt, not tracked), target is precise

verbatim.quote: If we cross 100 crore, everything changes. We become visible to institutional buyers.
verbatim.interpretation: Revenue milestone unlock — ₹100Cr is the threshold that changes competitive positioning

verbatim.quote: I want this business to run without me in every room. Right now if I take a week off, the pipeline stops.
verbatim.interpretation: Founder seeks operational independence — the business must function without the founder's constant presence

verbatim.quote: My sales head, Priya, she's the one who should be driving this. But she's buried.
verbatim.interpretation: The right owner is identified but has no protected bandwidth — routine operations consume all improvement capacity

verbatim.quote: The problem wasn't the campaigns — we didn't have a method. We just threw money at it and hoped.
verbatim.interpretation: Previous failure was structural (no method) not resource-based — founder has correct diagnosis

verbatim.quote: There's no designed process for lead generation. It's all ad-hoc.
verbatim.interpretation: No process exists — needs to be built from scratch, not optimized or repaired
